query: SELECT id, name, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(ergebnisse, '$.nettoCashflowMonat') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as cashflow_monat, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(ergebnisse, '$.bruttomietrendite') AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as rendite, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(ergebnisse, '$.gesamtinvestition') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) as investition, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(eingaben, '$.kaufpreis') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) as kaufpreis FROM immobilien;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3U7RdwAyRatrHfM.d220373967d3 --database 2xBzhMzezF48tjxTsZ5x2y --execute SELECT id, name, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(ergebnisse, '$.nettoCashflowMonat') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as cashflow_monat, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(ergebnisse, '$.bruttomietrendite') AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as rendite, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(ergebnisse, '$.gesamtinvestition') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) as investition, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(eingaben, '$.kaufpreis') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) as kaufpreis FROM immobilien;
